encoder.pattern: %d{ISO8601} level=%-5level trace_id=%X{trace_id} span_id=%X{span_id} method=%X{http_method} path=%X{http_path} remote_host=%X{remote_host} x_forwarded_for=%X{x_forwarded_for} x_real_ip=%X{x_real_ip} x_envoy_external_address=%X{x_envoy_external_address} user_agent=%X{user_agent} logger=%logger{36} thread=%thread msg=%msg%n%ex
